Headline: #67 67th-69th-71st , #94 California Temporary Reroute at 69th/Bell
ShortDescription: 67 67th-69th-71st , 94 California buses are temporarily rerouted : due to, street blockage near 69th/Bell.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#67 67th-69th-71st ,#94 California buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via 69th, Damen, 67th and Western including normal route streets due to street blockage at 69th/Bell.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #72 North Temporary Reroute at North Avenue/Karlov
ShortDescription: #72 North buses are rerouted in both directions via North Avenue, Grand, Pulaski and North Avenue due to fire department activity near North Avenue/Karlov.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#72 North buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via North Avenue, Grand, Pulaski, then resume their normal route on North Avenue.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to fire department activity near North Avenue/Karlov.
